description: Run a TDC benchmark group's evaluate protocol (5-seed) over a predictions file and report per-dataset mean +/- std.
rules: read-only — evaluates a local per-seed predictions payload against the group's protocol
predictions payload is JSON keyed by dataset -> seed -> list of predictions (seeds 1..5)
PyTDC fetches the benchmark group on first use; degrades gracefully (skipped report) when tdc/network is absent
per-dataset {mean, std} is written to record_store as bench.json
usage: Set TDC_GROUP (e.g. admet_group) and TDC_PRED (path to a JSON predictions file: {dataset: {seed: [preds]}}); optional TDC_PATH (group cache dir, defaults to record_store/data). Output: bench.json.
limitation: Read-only. Requires the PyTDC package and network access to fetch the benchmark group; offline it emits a skipped report. The 5-seed protocol (seeds 1-5) and the group's fixed splits must be respected for leaderboard-valid results.
